revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Ikazuchi Shrine (Q135186163)
| native_name = 雷社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Ikazuchi Shrine (Q135186163)
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Ikazuchi Shrine'''|雷社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ise Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11378973|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province}}
** Series ordinal: 49
** P155: {{ill|Mifune Shrine|lt=Mifune Shrine|ja|御船神社 (多気町)|qid=Q17214615|1=Mifune Shrine (Taki)}}
** P156: {{ill|Q17191305|ltq=Q17191305|qid=Q17191305|1=Ashihara Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q864166|ltq=Q864166|qid=Q864166|1=Ise Province}}
* {{ill|Watarai District|lt=Watarai district|ceb|Watarai-gun|ckb|گەڕەکی واتاری|en|Watarai District|es|Distrito de Watarai|fr|District de Watarai|id|Distrik Watarai, Mie|it|Distretto di Watarai|ja|度会郡|ko|와타라이군|pl|Powiat Watarai|uk|Повіт Ватарай|zh|度會郡|qid=Q1131032|1=Watarai District}}

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 181156
** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}

== country (P17) ==

* {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}}

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Raiden Shrine|lt=Raiden Shrine|qid=Q135039270|1=Raiden Shrine (Q135039270)}}
** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
